Harry (.
June 05

The 1% always engineer their systems so that when times are good, they reap the benefits first, and when times are bad, the Working Class suffers first & most, crushing us to cushion their fall.

So it's not enough to just "break the wheel" - we need to flip the tables, redistribute their wealth & power equitably, & do all that in a way that nobody can direct extra into their own pockets. How do we accomplish that?

Harry (he/him) yeah everyone yaps about "market corrections" and recessions being a redistribution of wealth. That's BS, stock markets have always been skewed to the rich. The only reliable way is through expropriation. Sadly, I don't see a socialism revolution happening in the US unless everyone's minimal needs are not being met.
